use: Brand reference, deck slide 1 background possibility, README hero, press kit
tool_recommended: Midjourney v7 (best for editorial composition) | Gemini 2.0 Flash image gen | ChatGPT image gen
prompt: An editorial brand identity board for a product called Aura, presented as a single 3840x2160 magazine spread on a warm off-white background, hex #FAF8F5. The composition uses an asymmetric 12-column bento grid with generous negative space and one ink-black hairline rule (1px, hex #0E0E0E) running horizontally one third from the top. Top-left tile, occupying columns 1 to 6 and rows 1 to 3: the wordmark 'aura' set in Fraunces variable serif at approximately 320 pt, ink black, with a hand-drawn-feel sunset orange underline (hex #FF5B2E, 6 px stroke, slight wobble) directly beneath the word. Below the wordmark in 18 pt Inter Tight sans tracked +40 ink black: 'an on-device empathetic intelligence layer'. Top-right tile, columns 7 to 12: three palette swatches stacked vertically labelled in 14 pt JetBrains Mono — '#FAF8F5 paper', '#0E0E0E ink', '#FF5B2E sunset' — each swatch 240x80 px, no shadow, no stroke. Middle row tile spanning all 12 columns: a type-specimen lockup showing 'Anticipate. Act. Stay quiet.' in Fraunces 96 pt centred, with the kicker 'Galaxy Brain · Samsung EnnovateX 2026' in 18 pt Inter Tight beneath. Bottom row, three tiles: tile 1 columns 1 to 4 shows a neutral line-art phone frame in 1.5 pt #0E0E0E stroke, no chrome, no manufacturer logo, displaying the Aura Morning Brief card in miniature; tile 2 columns 5 to 8 shows a 'before' state cluttered with 47 small dot icons in 25% opacity ink black representing notifications, and an 'after' state showing 4 sunset-orange dots only, separated by a hand-drawn arrow with the annotation 'the four that mattered' in 14 pt Inter Tight italic; tile 3 columns 9 to 12 shows a Reasoning Trace JSON snippet in JetBrains Mono 16 pt with the keys chosen, rationale, confirm_required highlighted in sunset orange. Reference visual languages: Linear About page, Arc Browser release notes, Nothing OS marketing, Teenage Engineering OP-1 spec sheet, Apple HIG opener, Editorial New magazine spreads. Strict English throughout. Indian context appears only as the named brand of the project, not through stereotypes. The image must feel like a senior brand designer's first board presented at a private review, not a Behance shot. No real device chrome of any kind. No team photos. No university crest. The single accent rule: sunset orange used at most three times across the entire image, on the wordmark underline, on the 'after' notification dots, and on the Reasoning Trace key highlights, nowhere else.
negative_prompt: stock photos, glowing brain, neuron graphics, gradient blobs, glassmorphism, robot icons, isometric phones in space, blue tech-gradient, light bulb metaphors, neon, drop shadows, real Apple chrome, real Galaxy chrome, manufacturer logos, university crest, team photographs, AI hand-of-god illustrations, lens flare, particle effects, Awwwards-template aesthetic, empower, leverage, seamless, revolutionary, paradigm, holistic, robust, cutting-edge, AI-powered, transformative
post_processing: Crop to exactly 3840x2160 if the model overshoots. Verify hex colours are exact, not approximate.

use: Phase 1 deck slide 3 hero screenshot, site hero, README, social hero
tool_recommended: Nano Banana | Gemini 2.0 Flash image gen | Midjourney v7
prompt: A single screenshot of the Aura Morning Brief card rendered inside a neutral line-art phone frame at 1170x2532 px. The phone frame is drawn as a 1.5 pt ink-black stroke (hex #0E0E0E) outlining a generic rectangular phone with rounded corners, no manufacturer logo, no Apple Dynamic Island, no Galaxy hole-punch, no notch graphic, no buttons rendered. Inside the frame the screen background is warm off-white hex #FAF8F5. The status bar at the top is minimal: '7:00' time on the left in Inter Tight 14 pt ink black, plain Wi-Fi and battery glyphs on the right, no carrier name. Below the status bar a kicker reads 'MONDAY MORNING' in Inter Tight 14 pt tracked +40 ink black at 50% opacity. Below the kicker a hero numeral '5.2h' is set in Fraunces 96 pt ink black, with 'sleep · pushed gym to 6pm' in Inter Tight 22 pt ink black at 60% opacity directly beneath. A 1 px ink-black hairline at 20% opacity separates this hero from the next block. Next block is a card with no fill and a 1 px hairline border at 20%, padding 20 px, containing: a label '9:00 — DSA QUIZ' in Inter Tight 14 pt tracked +40, then a body line 'professor's slides summarised at 11:48pm last night · tap to read' in Inter Tight 22 pt ink black, then a sunset-orange #FF5B2E button labelled 'Leave by 8:15' in Inter Tight 18 pt white. Below this card, a friends row reads 'going · Anu, Manish, Riya' in Inter Tight 18 pt ink black at 60% opacity. Bottom of the screen has a small Silence Budget indicator: three small rounded squares labelled '2 / 3 surfaces today' with two filled in #FF5B2E and one empty 1 px stroke ink black. Hand-drawn-feel sunset-orange annotations sit OUTSIDE the phone frame to the right, rendered as 1.5 pt strokes with slight wobble: a circle around '5.2h' with the note 'anticipated' in Inter Tight 14 pt italic, and an arrow pointing to the Leave-by button with the note 'one tap to act' in 14 pt italic. Reference: Linear changelog hero, Things 3 today screen, Apple HIG product pages. Strict English. The screen content is what an Indian Gen Z college student sees at 7am on a Monday in Patiala. No team photos. No glow. No drop shadow. No skeuomorphic phone chrome.
negative_prompt: stock photo, real iPhone Dynamic Island, real Galaxy hole-punch, manufacturer logo, glow, drop shadow, glassmorphism, gradient, neon, neuron graphics, brain icon, robot icon, light bulb, AI cliché, hand reaching toward phone, finger on screen, Apple chrome, Samsung chrome, blue tech gradient, isometric perspective, empower, leverage, seamless, revolutionary, paradigm, holistic, robust, cutting-edge, AI-powered, transformative
post_processing: Verify the phone frame contains no manufacturer chrome. Ensure all text is legibly rendered, not garbled. If text is garbled, retry with the same prompt; if persists, render text via Figma overlay on top of the generated frame.

use: Signature visual of the product. Phase 1 deck slide 4 inset, slide 8a hero, site Reasoning Trace section, README, all social posts
tool_recommended: Midjourney v7 (best fidelity for code-rendered text) | Gemini 2.0 Flash | ChatGPT image gen
prompt: A single screenshot of the Aura Reasoning Trace drawer rendered inside a neutral line-art phone frame at 1170x2532 px. The phone frame is the same generic 1.5 pt ink-black outline as image 02, no manufacturer chrome of any kind. Inside, a screen background of warm off-white hex #FAF8F5. Top of screen, status bar at '11:32' in Inter Tight 14 pt. Below the status bar a header card reads 'REASONING TRACE' in Inter Tight 14 pt tracked +40 ink black at 50%, then below it 'mute · group · 30 min' in Fraunces 56 pt ink black. A 1 px sunset-orange hairline (hex #FF5B2E) sits directly under this header at 4 px stroke width, the only sunset-orange element in the upper third of the screen. The body of the drawer below the header is rendered as a Stripe-API-docs-styled JSON code block: monospace JetBrains Mono 16 pt, ink-black on the off-white background, no syntax-highlight rainbow colours. The JSON keys 'chosen', 'rationale', and 'confirm_required' are highlighted in sunset orange (hex #FF5B2E). The trace content reads exactly: { 'trigger': 'Wellness state alert', 'signals': { 'load_score': 78, 'top_drivers': ['HRV crash', 'app-switch entropy'] }, 'candidates': ['mute_group_30min', 'breathe_4_7_8', 'nap_15min', 'do_nothing'], 'chosen': 'mute_group_30min', 'rationale': 'WhatsApp project group fired 137 messages in 12 minutes; load score 78 above threshold; calendar gap 30 min; user has 2 surfaces left in Silence Budget today.', 'confirm_required': true, 'silence_budget_after_action': '1 / 3 surfaces remaining today', 'ts': '2026-05-07T22:31:14+05:30' }. Each top-level key is on its own line, child values indented 4 spaces. Below the JSON block sit two minimal action buttons full-width: a sunset-orange filled button labelled 'Confirm — mute group' in Inter Tight 18 pt white, and a 1 px stroke ink-black ghost button labelled 'Edit' in Inter Tight 18 pt ink black. Below these, a small line in Inter Tight 14 pt at 50% opacity reads 'every Aura action emits a trace · tap to inspect, edit, or reject'. To the right of the phone frame, outside the screen, a hand-drawn sunset-orange annotation circles the keys 'chosen' and 'rationale' with the label 'glass-box' in Inter Tight 14 pt italic. Reference: Stripe API documentation pages, Linear API reference, Things 3 details pane. The trace must read like real production observability output, not a marketing mockup. Strict English. No team photos.
negative_prompt: rainbow syntax highlighting, multicoloured code, gradient backgrounds, glow on the JSON, 3D effects, neon, lens flare, real iPhone chrome, real Galaxy chrome, manufacturer logos, hand reaching toward phone, finger on screen, robot icon, brain icon, neuron, lightbulb, particle effects, glassmorphism, drop shadow, blue tech gradient, AI hand-of-god illustration, terminal-green hacker aesthetic, empower, leverage, seamless, revolutionary, paradigm, holistic, robust, cutting-edge, AI-powered, transformative
post_processing: If JSON text renders garbled, render the trace separately in Figma using JetBrains Mono and overlay onto the generated frame. The exact JSON keys 'chosen', 'rationale', 'confirm_required' must be legible at projector resolution.

use: Phase 1 deck slide 9 supporting, site privacy section, threat model doc hero, ADR-0005 illustration

prompt: A single screenshot of the Aura Memory tab rendered inside a neutral line-art phone frame at 1170x2532 px (same generic frame as prior screens, no manufacturer chrome). Screen background warm off-white hex #FAF8F5. Top status bar '14:08' in Inter Tight 14 pt. Tab bar across the top with three labels: 'BRIEF', 'MEMORY' (active, ink black 14 pt tracked +40 with a 4 px sunset-orange #FF5B2E underline beneath), 'SETTINGS' (inactive, ink black at 50% opacity). Below the tab bar, a hero header in Fraunces 56 pt ink black reads 'your memory, your keys'. A subhead in Inter Tight 22 pt at 60% opacity reads '0 bytes of personal data have ever left this device.' Below that, a stat block: in Fraunces 96 pt ink black '1,847' with caption 'events stored on-device · last 30 days' in Inter Tight 14 pt at 60%. Next, three full-width action rows separated by 1 px hairlines at 20% opacity, each row 88 px tall, each row containing on the left an Inter Tight 22 pt ink-black label and on the right a small 1 px stroke ink-black ghost button labelled in Inter Tight 18 pt: 'Export memory to JSON' → 'Export', 'Delete by time range' → 'Delete', 'Audit log' → 'Open'. Below the rows, a small badge sits centred: a rounded rectangle 320 px wide, 1 px ink-black stroke, padding 16 px, containing the label 'Audit Merkle root · 2026-05-07' in Inter Tight 14 pt tracked +40 at 50% opacity, then below it an actual short hex hash like '7f3a · b2c1 · 8e4d · 9a02' in JetBrains Mono 16 pt ink black. The badge has a single sunset-orange #FF5B2E left-edge accent 4 px wide, the only orange on the screen. Below the badge a footer line in Inter Tight 14 pt at 50% reads 'tamper-evident · re-derive any past day from the chain'. Outside the phone frame to the left, a hand-drawn sunset-orange annotation arrow points at the Export row with the label 'one tap · plaintext JSON' in Inter Tight 14 pt italic. Reference: Apple HIG settings, Linear settings page, Stripe Dashboard. The screen must communicate 'you own this' without saying it. Strict English. No team photos.

prompt: A single screenshot of the Aura Spend Mirror card rendered inside a neutral line-art phone frame at 1170x2532 px (generic frame, no manufacturer chrome). Screen background warm off-white hex #FAF8F5. Status bar at '21:00'. Below status bar a header reads 'FRIDAY · WEEK 18' in Inter Tight 14 pt tracked +40 ink black at 50%. Hero numeral 'rupee 2,400' in Fraunces 96 pt ink black with the rupee symbol rendered correctly, with caption beneath in Inter Tight 22 pt at 60%: 'over your average this week'. Beneath the hero a 1 px hairline at 20% opacity. Then a card with no fill and a 1 px hairline border, padding 20 px, containing four parsed transaction rows in JetBrains Mono 16 pt ink black laid out like SMS log entries: 'mon · 22:14 · zomato · rupee 420', 'wed · 13:42 · swiggy · rupee 380', 'thu · 23:08 · zomato · rupee 540', 'fri · 20:51 · blinkit · rupee 1,060'. Below the transactions a small line in Inter Tight 14 pt at 60% reads 'parsed from your HDFC SMS · never sent to cloud'. Below this card, a sunset-orange #FF5B2E filled action button full width labelled 'Cook tomorrow? · skip 2 orders, save rupee 800' in Inter Tight 18 pt white. Below the button a small line in Inter Tight 14 pt at 50% reads 'one tap · or swipe to dismiss'. At the very bottom of the screen, the Silence Budget indicator: three small rounded squares with two filled in #FF5B2E, one empty 1 px ink-black stroke, label '2 / 3 surfaces today' in 14 pt. Outside the phone frame to the right, a hand-drawn sunset-orange annotation circles the rupee 2,400 hero with the label 'Indian context · UPI native' in Inter Tight 14 pt italic. Strict English. No team photos.

use: Phase 1 deck slide 5 wedge illustration (silence-as-feature), site Aura wedges section, lead Instagram carousel image, X thread hero
tool_recommended: Midjourney v7 | Nano Banana | Gemini 2.0 Flash
prompt: A single screenshot of the Aura Quiet Group Chat triage card rendered inside a neutral line-art phone frame at 1170x2532 px (generic frame, no manufacturer chrome). Screen background warm off-white hex #FAF8F5. Status bar at '23:01'. Below the status bar a kicker reads 'YOUR DBMS PROJECT GROUP' in Inter Tight 14 pt tracked +40 ink black at 50%. Hero composition is a numerical statement set as Fraunces 96 pt: '137 messages · 3 matter' on two lines, ink black, with the '137' and '3' numerals carrying slightly heavier weight. Below the hero, a card with no fill and a 1 px hairline border at 20% padding 20 px, containing three short message-preview rows in Inter Tight 22 pt: '· anu · the schema diagram is wrong on slide 4', '· prof · extension to 9am tomorrow', '· manish · who has the DBMS slides?'. Each row prefixed with a 4 px sunset-orange #FF5B2E circle bullet. Below the three rows a 1 px hairline. Below the hairline a row in Inter Tight 14 pt at 60% opacity reads '134 social messages muted until 1:00am'. Below this card a sunset-orange filled action button full width labelled 'Confirm · mute the rest' in Inter Tight 18 pt white. Below the button a Silence Budget indicator: three rounded squares, two filled #FF5B2E one empty 1 px ink-black stroke, label '2 / 3 surfaces today' in 14 pt. Outside the phone frame to the left, a hand-drawn sunset-orange annotation arrow points at the '134 social messages muted' line with the note 'silence as feature' in Inter Tight 14 pt italic, then below it a smaller note 'rate-limited to 3 surfaces a day · the rest is silence'. Reference: Linear inbox triage, Things 3, Apple Mail VIP filters, Stripe webhook log. The screen demonstrates that the assistant chose to NOT show 134 things. Strict English. No team photos.

use: Phase 1 deck slide 5 biometric-loop wedge, site evidence, social Instagram carousel slide, Phase 2 KPI report illustration
tool_recommended: Nano Banana | Gemini 2.0 Flash | Midjourney v7
prompt: A single screenshot of the Aura Load Score panel rendered inside a neutral line-art phone frame at 1170x2532 px (generic frame, no manufacturer chrome). Screen background warm off-white hex #FAF8F5. Status bar at '22:32'. Below status bar a kicker 'WELLNESS · LIVE' in Inter Tight 14 pt tracked +40 ink black at 50%. Hero numeral '78 / 100' in Fraunces 96 pt ink black. Caption beneath in Inter Tight 22 pt at 60%: 'load score · last 5 minutes'. A 1 px hairline at 20% opacity below. Below the hairline, a small chart strip 1080 px wide and 240 px tall: an x-axis showing the last 30 minutes, y-axis showing load score 0 to 100, the score line drawn in 1.5 pt ink-black stroke ascending from 38 to 78 with one short segment in sunset-orange #FF5B2E showing the threshold-crossing moment, no fill under the line, no gridlines, just two y-axis labels '0' and '100' and two x-axis labels '-30m' and 'now' in Inter Tight 14 pt at 50% opacity. Below the chart, a drivers list, three rows in Inter Tight 18 pt ink black with small ink-black squares on the left as bullets: 'HRV crashed · RMSSD 28', 'typing entropy spiked · last 8 minutes', 'app-switch rate · 11 / minute'. Below the drivers, a card with no fill, 1 px hairline border, padding 20 px, containing a header 'SUGGESTED' in Inter Tight 14 pt tracked +40 at 50%, then a recommendation in Inter Tight 22 pt ink black: 'mute the project group for 30 min · breathe 4-7-8 once'. Below the card a sunset-orange filled action button full width 'Confirm both' in Inter Tight 18 pt white. Below it a 1 px stroke ink-black ghost button 'Just the mute'. Outside the phone frame to the right, a hand-drawn sunset-orange annotation circles the '78 / 100' hero with the label 'closed-loop · biometric to action' in Inter Tight 14 pt italic. Reference: Apple Health activity rings, Linear analytics, Things 3 stats. Strict English. No team photos.

post_processing: Verify the load-score line is one continuous stroke, not multiple coloured segments. Only the threshold-crossing segment is orange.

use: Phase 1 deck slide 4a plausibility/constraints, ADR-0003 illustration, site silence-as-feature section

Beneath that an Inter Tight 22 pt ink-black at 60% opacity subhead reads 'aura is silent the rest of today.' Below this hero, a small history block listing today's three surfaced actions in Inter Tight 18 pt ink black, each row prefixed by a small ink-black filled circle bullet and a timestamp in JetBrains Mono 14 pt at 50% opacity: '08:14 · morning brief · marked useful', '13:27 · spend mirror · marked useful', '20:48 · stress mute · accepted'. Below the history a 1 px hairline at 20%. use: Phase 1 deck slide 9 supporting, threat model doc hero, ADR-0007 illustration, site privacy section
tool_recommended: Midjourney v7 | Nano Banana | Gemini 2.0 Flash
prompt: A single screenshot of the Aura Audit Log view rendered inside a neutral line-art phone frame at 1170x2532 px (generic frame, no manufacturer chrome). Screen background warm off-white hex #FAF8F5. Status bar at '02:14'. Below the status bar a kicker 'MEMORY · AUDIT LOG' in Inter Tight 14 pt tracked +40 ink black at 50%. Hero header in Fraunces 56 pt ink black 'every read, every write' with subhead in Inter Tight 22 pt at 60% 'append-only · tamper-evident · exportable'. Below the hero a 1 px hairline at 20%. Body of the screen is a list of audit entries rendered in JetBrains Mono 14 pt ink black, each row 56 px tall, each row containing on a single line: timestamp in 50% opacity, then a single space, then an action verb in regular ink black, then the target entity at 70% opacity. Show approximately 12 rows scrolling off the bottom of the visible viewport (so the 12th row partially clipped). Example rows: '2026-05-07T22:31:14  WROTE  trace_4f2a (mute_group_30min)', '2026-05-07T22:31:14  REFUNDED  silence_budget +1 (useful tap)', '2026-05-07T20:48:02  WROTE  action_a3c1 (stress_mute_accept)', '2026-05-07T13:27:15  READ  finance.transactions[7d]', '2026-05-07T13:27:15  WROTE  trace_8b4c (spend_mirror)', '2026-05-07T08:14:00  WROTE  trace_2e91 (morning_brief)', '2026-05-07T07:00:00  READ  health.hrv[24h]', '2026-05-07T06:55:00  EXPORTED  memory.json -> /Files/aura_2026-05-07.json', '2026-05-07T06:50:00  DELETED  health.hrv[< 90d]', '2026-05-07T06:50:00  ROOT  daily_merkle 7f3a-b2c1-8e4d-9a02', '2026-05-06T23:59:59  ROOT  daily_merkle 4d12-9c3e-2f81-a7b3', '2026-05-06T22:14:08  WROTE  trace_5a02 (quiet_group)'. Sunset-orange #FF5B2E rendered ONLY on the two 'ROOT' lines, on the word 'ROOT' alone, signalling daily Merkle root entries. Below the visible list, a thin 1 px hairline. Below the hairline a footer row with two ghost buttons: 'Export full log to JSON' (1 px stroke ink-black) and 'Verify Merkle chain' (1 px stroke ink-black). Outside the phone frame to the left, a hand-drawn sunset-orange annotation arrow points at one of the 'ROOT' lines with the note 'one Merkle root per day · re-derivable' in Inter Tight 14 pt italic. Reference: Stripe Dashboard logs, Linear timeline, GitHub commit log. Strict English. No team photos.

post_processing: All timestamps must be ISO 8601. The only sunset-orange elements are the two 'ROOT' words. If text renders garbled, render in Figma with JetBrains Mono and overlay.

use: Phase 2 pilot kit illustration, ADR-0010 + ADR-0011 reference, threat model doc, recruitment poster inset
tool_recommended: Midjourney v7 | Gemini 2.0 Flash | Nano Banana
prompt: A single screenshot of the Aura pilot consent screen rendered inside a neutral line-art phone frame at 1170x2532 px (generic frame, no manufacturer chrome). Screen background warm off-white hex #FAF8F5. Status bar at '10:00'. Below the status bar a kicker 'PILOT · CONSENT' in Inter Tight 14 pt tracked +40 ink black at 50%. Hero header in Fraunces 56 pt ink black 'plain English. yours to revoke.' below it Inter Tight 22 pt at 60% 'we read these signals on this device. nothing leaves it.' Body is a four-row list with checkbox-style toggles. Each row is 88 px tall, separated by 1 px hairlines at 20% opacity. The toggles render as small 1 px ink-black stroke rounded rectangles 56x32 px on the right of the row. Two of the four toggles are filled with sunset-orange #FF5B2E (turned ON), the other two are empty (OFF). Each row has a left-aligned label in Inter Tight 22 pt ink black and a smaller subline in Inter Tight 14 pt at 60%: row 1 'heart rate variability · Apple Watch' / 'used to compute load score on-device only' / ON, row 2 'gmail metadata · receipts only' / 'parsed locally for spend mirror; bodies never stored' / ON, row 3 'notification access · all apps' / 'used to triage; message bodies never stored' / OFF, row 4 'optional voice prosody · ambient' / 'arousal-only features; never transcribed' / OFF. Below the list a 1 px hairline. Below the hairline a small block in Inter Tight 14 pt at 60% reads 'export your data anytime · delete by time range · audit log · in-person observation only during this study'. Below the block, two action buttons stacked: a sunset-orange filled button 'I consent · begin Wizard-of-Oz session' in Inter Tight 18 pt white, and a 1 px stroke ink-black ghost button 'Decline'. Outside the phone frame to the right, a hand-drawn sunset-orange annotation circles the third toggle (notifications, OFF) with the note 'every permission asks why · default safe' in Inter Tight 14 pt italic. Reference: Apple App Tracking Transparency dialog, Linear settings, Things 3 onboarding. Strict English. No team photos.

use: Phase 3 finals deck stage demo screen, projector legibility test, Phase 3 dress rehearsal reference
tool_recommended: Midjourney v7 | Nano Banana | Gemini 2.0 Flash
prompt: A single screenshot of the Aura on-stage demo brief screen, rendered inside a neutral line-art phone frame at 1170x2532 px (generic frame, no manufacturer chrome), specifically composed for projector legibility from a 6-metre audience distance. All type sizes are 1.5x larger than the regular Morning Brief. Screen background warm off-white hex #FAF8F5. Status bar shows '14:30' (matches the Phase 3 finals slot 30 July 2026 afternoon). Below status bar a kicker 'TAJ YESHWANTHPUR · 30 JULY 2026 · 14:30' in Inter Tight 18 pt tracked +40 ink black at 50%. Hero in Fraunces 144 pt ink black 'live · on this iPhone' with subhead in Inter Tight 32 pt at 60% 'no cloud · no Galaxy device · no faked numbers'. Below the hero a 1 px hairline at 20%. Body is a single card with no fill, 1 px hairline, padding 24 px, containing three demonstration beats in Inter Tight 32 pt ink black, each on its own line, each prefixed with a small filled ink-black square bullet 12x12 px: 'morning brief from real Apple Watch HRV', 'WhatsApp 137-message triage from real notification listener', 'spend mirror from real HDFC SMS'. Below the card a sunset-orange #FF5B2E filled action button full width 'Tap to begin' in Inter Tight 28 pt white, the only sunset-orange element on the screen. At the very bottom a small line in Inter Tight 18 pt at 50% reads 'Galaxy Brain · Shaurya Punj · Shorya Gupta · Thapar Institute'. Outside the phone frame to the left, a hand-drawn sunset-orange annotation circles the kicker date with the note 'live · this slot · this device' in Inter Tight 18 pt italic. The image's job: when projected, the audience reads every line at distance. Reference: Apple Keynote opening slide, Linear changelog hero. Strict English. No team photos.

use: Phase 1 deck slide 4 hero, site architecture section, README architecture, docs/architecture.md hero
tool_recommended: Use the existing Mermaid SVG at aura/design/architecture/aura_architecture.svg as the source. Re-style in Figma using the styling guide at aura/design/architecture/aura_architecture_styling.md. If using image gen as a fallback, use Midjourney v7 with the prompt below.
prompt: A clean three-layer architecture diagram on a warm off-white background hex #FAF8F5, rendered for a 1920x1080 slide. The diagram has three labelled tiers stacked vertically with generous vertical spacing. Top tier label in Fraunces 56 pt ink black hex #0E0E0E reads 'SENSE'. Below the label, a horizontal row of seven small rounded rectangles, each 200x88 px, 1 px ink-black stroke, no fill, no shadow, with labels in Inter Tight 18 pt ink black: 'UsageStats', 'NotificationListener', 'Gmail API', 'Calendar API', 'SMS reader', 'HealthKit / Health Connect', 'typing entropy IME'. Middle tier label in Fraunces 56 pt 'INTELLIGENCE'. Below the label, a centred row of five rounded rectangles, sized 240x120 px, 1 px ink-black stroke, no fill, with bold ink-black labels in Inter Tight 22 pt: 'Comms Agent', 'Calendar Agent', 'Finance Agent', 'Wellness Agent', and a slightly larger central rectangle 320x120 px also 1 px ink-black stroke labelled 'Orchestrator (Phi-3-mini)'. The Orchestrator's outline border is rendered in sunset orange #FF5B2E 4 px stroke (the only orange element of its kind in the diagram), and a single ink-black arrow head rests on its right side pointing inward from each agent. Bottom tier label in Fraunces 56 pt 'EXPERIENCE'. Below the label, four rounded rectangles 200x88 px, 1 px ink-black stroke, no fill, labels: 'Phone (Brief, Trace)', 'Watch glance', 'Buds whisper', 'Tablet/Laptop continuation'. Arrows: orthogonal right-angle 1.5 pt ink-black arrows with triangular heads, no curves, no bezier, connecting Sense to Intelligence, Intelligence to Experience, and a return loop on the right side from Experience back into a small rectangle labelled 'Memory Graph (sqlite-vss + Merkle)' positioned vertically at the right edge of the canvas spanning all three tiers, also 1 px ink-black stroke 240x320 px. The diagram includes one short horizontal arrow from Memory Graph back into the Orchestrator labelled 'Reasoning Trace' in Inter Tight 14 pt italic ink black. The single sunset-orange element is the Orchestrator's border; nothing else is orange. No fills, no gradients, no shadows. Reference: Stripe API architecture diagrams, Linear engineering blog diagrams, Apple HIG system diagrams. Strict English. No team photos.
negative_prompt: hexagonal honeycomb shapes, cloud icons, server-rack icons, brain icons, neural-net diagrams with glowing nodes, gradient backgrounds, gradient arrows, glow on the orchestrator, particle effects, neon, glassmorphism, 3D shapes, isometric perspective, AWS-style icons, blue tech gradient, empower, leverage, seamless, revolutionary, paradigm, holistic, robust, cutting-edge, AI-powered, transformative
post_processing: Prefer the Mermaid SVG re-styled in Figma over a generated PNG. If using a generated PNG, verify every label is legible at 1920x1080 projector resolution.

use: Phase 1 deck slide 4a plausibility extension, technical_spec.md illustration, demo dress rehearsal training
tool_recommended: Mermaid hand-rendered + Figma. Image-gen fallback via Midjourney v7.
prompt: A clean swim-lane data flow diagram on warm off-white background hex #FAF8F5, rendered for 1920x1080 slide. The diagram shows the eleven-step stress-driven mute flow as a horizontal sequence with three swim lanes stacked vertically. Lane labels on the left, each label in Fraunces 32 pt ink black: 'SENSE', 'INTELLIGENCE', 'EXPERIENCE'. The horizontal axis is time, marked at six tick points labelled in Inter Tight 14 pt at 50%: '0s', '60s', '120s', '180s', '240s', '300s'. Eleven nodes are placed across the lanes, each node a 1 px ink-black stroke rounded rectangle 200x60 px with a Inter Tight 14 pt ink-black label, connected by orthogonal 1.5 pt ink-black arrows with triangular heads. The eleven nodes in order: 1 'HRV stream poll · 5min' (Sense lane), 2 'typing entropy · 1min' (Sense), 3 'app-switch rate · 1min' (Sense), 4 'Wellness Agent · compute Load Score = 78' (Intelligence), 5 'state_alert emitted' (Intelligence), 6 'Orchestrator · query Calendar' (Intelligence), 7 'Orchestrator · query Comms current chat' (Intelligence), 8 'Orchestrator · rank candidates' (Intelligence), 9 'Orchestrator · select mute_group_30min' (Intelligence), 10 'Watch haptic + phone card · confirm required' (Experience), 11 'mute applied · trace logged · Silence Budget 1 / 3' (Experience). The arrow connecting node 4 to node 5 has a small inline annotation in Inter Tight 14 pt italic 'load > 70'. The arrow from node 10 to node 11 has the annotation 'one tap accept'. Sunset-orange #FF5B2E used only on node 9 (the chosen action node) — its border is sunset-orange 4 px stroke, and only on the horizontal arrow exiting node 11 indicating 'trace flows to Memory Graph'. No other orange. No fills. No shadows. No gradients. Reference: Stripe API sequence diagrams, Linear engineering swim-lanes, Apple HIG sequence flows. Strict English.

post_processing: Verify the eleven nodes are in correct order. The 'chosen action' node (9) is the only one with a sunset-orange border.

use: ADR-0003 illustration, slide 4a inset, docs/decisions/ADR-0003-silence-budget.md hero
tool_recommended: Mermaid + Figma. Image-gen fallback via Midjourney v7.
prompt: A clean state-machine diagram on warm off-white hex #FAF8F5 background, rendered for 1920x1080 slide. The diagram shows the Silence Budget token decrement and refund cycle. Six circular state nodes (each 160 px diameter, 1.5 pt ink-black stroke, no fill) labelled in Inter Tight 18 pt ink black: 'Idle (3 tokens)', 'Trigger evaluated', 'Surface candidate (2 tokens)', 'User taps Useful', 'User taps Dismiss', 'Recovering (0 tokens)'. Arrows are 1.5 pt ink-black with triangular heads, labelled in Inter Tight 14 pt italic. Transitions: Idle → Trigger evaluated (label 'agent emits alert'), Trigger evaluated → Surface candidate (label 'score > threshold AND token > 0', this transition's arrow rendered in sunset-orange #FF5B2E), Surface candidate → User taps Useful (label 'action serves user'), Surface candidate → User taps Dismiss (label 'action does not'), User taps Useful → Idle (label '+1 refund · capped at 3'), User taps Dismiss → Idle (label 'no refund'), and a separate transition Surface candidate → Recovering when tokens reach 0 (label 'cap hit · silent rest of day'). The Recovering state has a single arrow back to Idle labelled 'midnight reset'. Sunset-orange #FF5B2E is used only on the Trigger → Surface arrow, signalling the moment a token is spent; nowhere else. Title above the diagram in Fraunces 56 pt ink black: 'SILENCE BUDGET' with a sunset-orange 4 px hand-drawn-feel underline beneath. Subtitle in Inter Tight 22 pt at 60% 'three tokens. spent on surface. earned by usefulness.' Reference: Stripe state diagrams, Apple HIG state flows, Linear engineering blog. Strict English.
negative_prompt: coin icons, clock icon, brain icon, padlock with timer, hourglass, robot icon, glow, neon, gradient, glassmorphism, drop shadow, isometric, 3D, blue tech gradient, particle effects, empower, leverage, seamless, revolutionary, paradigm, holistic, robust, cutting-edge, AI-powered, transformative
post_processing: Verify exactly six states. The token-spending arrow is the only orange element in the diagram body.

use: Phase 1 deck slide 9 hero chart, Phase 2 KPI report, site evidence section, social posts
tool_recommended: Render with matplotlib using the spec at aura/design/charts/kpi_chart_spec.md. Image-gen fallback via Midjourney v7.
prompt: A clean bar chart on a warm off-white background hex #FAF8F5, rendered for 1920x1080 slide. The chart shows six paired bar groups along the horizontal axis, each pair representing one KPI with a 'Baseline' bar and an 'Aura' bar side by side. Group labels in Inter Tight 18 pt ink black hex #0E0E0E along the bottom: 'Effort reduction (s)', 'Task completion (%)', 'Autonomy quality (1-5)', 'Satisfaction (1-5)', 'Stress reduction (HRV ms)', 'Willingness to pay (%)'. Y-axis labels per group are independent (each group has its own y-axis tick range printed beside the bars). Chart title at top in Fraunces 56 pt ink black 'baseline vs Aura · projected at Phase 1', with a sunset-orange #FF5B2E 4 px hand-drawn-feel underline. Subtitle in Inter Tight 22 pt at 60% 'all bars dashed at submission · solid bars publish in Phase 2 with raw CSV'. Bars rendered as follows: every bar has a 1 px ink-black border. Baseline bars have NO fill, dashed border 1.5 pt. Aura bars have sunset-orange #FF5B2E fill, dashed top edge 1.5 pt (because Phase 1 = projection, not measured). 95% confidence interval error bars rendered as 1 pt ink-black caps on each bar (labelled '[Phase 2: replaces with measured CI]' in 14 pt italic at 50% opacity once, in a footnote not over the bars). Above each pair, the projected uplift in Inter Tight 18 pt ink black, e.g., 'effort -32%', 'completion +8 pts', 'autonomy +0.4', 'satisfaction +0.6', 'stress recovery +14ms RMSSD', 'WTP +24 pts'. Y-axes have minimal ticks: just min and max per group. No gridlines. No legend on the chart itself; instead a single line below the chart in Inter Tight 14 pt at 60%: 'baseline = current toolkit · Aura = projected from synthetic test · n_pilot = 30 (planned)'. Reference: Linear analytics, Stripe Atlas charts, FT Visual Vocabulary, BBG Markets editorial. Strict English. No emojis.
negative_prompt: rainbow bars, gradient bars, 3D bars, animated bars, gridlines everywhere, drop shadow on bars, glow, neon, glassmorphism, blue tech gradient, generic Excel chart aesthetic, AI-generated chart cliché, empower, leverage, seamless, revolutionary, paradigm, holistic, robust, cutting-edge, AI-powered, transformative
post_processing: All bars MUST be dashed (Phase 1 projection state). When real measurements arrive in Phase 2, regenerate via matplotlib with solid bars and real CIs.

use: Phase 2 KPI report, technical_spec.md §7 illustration, ADR-0003 evidence
tool_recommended: Render with matplotlib once Phase 2 data exists. Image-gen fallback via Midjourney v7 (placeholder).
prompt: A clean scatter plot on warm off-white background hex #FAF8F5 rendered for 1920x1080 slide. The chart shows the Load Score validation: x-axis is participant self-rated stress 1 to 5, y-axis is Aura's computed Load Score 0 to 100. Points are 6 px diameter ink-black hex #0E0E0E filled circles. The trend line is a 1.5 pt ink-black solid line. A bootstrap 95% confidence interval band around the trend line is rendered as 1 pt ink-black at 25% opacity, no fill colour. Title in Fraunces 56 pt ink black 'load score · validated against self-rated stress' with a sunset-orange #FF5B2E 4 px hand-drawn-feel underline. Subtitle in Inter Tight 22 pt at 60% 'Spearman rho = [PHASE 2: replace with measured value] · 95% CI from 10,000 bootstrap resamples'. Axis labels in Inter Tight 18 pt ink black: x-axis 'self-rated stress · 1 = calm, 5 = peak', y-axis 'Aura Load Score · 0 to 100'. Tick marks at 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 on x-axis; at 0, 25, 50, 75, 100 on y-axis. Sunset-orange #FF5B2E used only on a single horizontal dashed reference line at y=70 labelled 'intervention threshold' in 14 pt italic. No other orange. No gridlines. Reference: scientific journal scatter plots, Linear analytics, FT Visual Vocabulary. Strict English. The image clearly states this is a Phase 1 placeholder; once Phase 2 data lands the Spearman rho number replaces the bracketed placeholder.
